title: Smoky Fluffy Chicken Brazilian Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly one-pot dish featuring smoky flavors and braise-flavored chicken bouillon powder for a tender and fluffy texture.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chicken and cook until golden brown on both sides.
Remove chicken from the pan and set aside. Add bell peppers, onion, and garlic to the same pan.
Stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are slightly softened.
Return chicken to the pan along with bouillon packet.
Pour in water (enough to cover ingredients), bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for approximately 10 minutes.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
